title: License-driven crypto-infra M&A
question: Why does the CLARITY/GENIUS regime make a money-transmitter licence stack the strategic asset, and who buys it?
finding: **Ongoing tracker** — acquirers buy the licence stack, not build it: ~$6.0bn across 8 disclosed completed deals (+1 undisclosed, +$2.4bn terminated). The cohort sits in deep drawdowns and has so far *sold the news* on GENIUS/CLARITY milestones. Identifies the pattern, names no target.
